title: iconv
html:
iconv

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

iconv -f 8859_1 -t 8859_1 /path/to/input-file

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo DATA | iconv -f 8859_1 -t 8859_1 -o /path/to/output-file
excerpt: iconv File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged iconv -f 8859_1 -t 8859_1 /path/to/input-file File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo DATA | iconv -f 8859_1 -t 8859_1 -o /path/to/output-fi
